text.title: Sprint Capacity From Complexity Tags Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have ≥3 completed sprints with complexity-tagged tasks?

conclusion.verdict: build capacity model with 3-sprint rolling window

example.trace: input matches `history_sprints >= 3` → sub-question → `tags_canonical == true` → conclusion ref=`rolling-window-3`.
